title: Clarify optional docs site commands
summary: README and contributor guidance now keep normal fork/local EVE commands focused on the CLI and embedded UI, with Fumadocs commands scoped to documentation-site work only.
userVisibleChange: People forking the repository no longer see the docs site build or dev server as part of the normal EVE verification path.

decisions.title: Keep Vercel/Fumadocs instructions available, but label them as optional for documentation editing or deployment instead of default local usage.
